languages.text: "Я обнаружил{mf||а} кровавый след, тянущийся от заставы к балкону. Тело волокли, а затем сбросили через край".

traits.locale_text: "Я обнаружил{mf||а} кровавый след, тянущийся от заставы к балкону. Тело волокли, а затем сбросили через край".

languages.text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."
languages.original_text: "Я обнаружил{mf||а} кровавый след, тянущийся от заставы к балкону. Тело волокли, а затем сбросили через край".

traits.locale_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."
"I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."
"I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

languages.text: “我发现一条血迹从前哨一直延伸至露台。尸体曾被拖行至此，随后从边缘抛了下去。”
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: “我发现一条血迹从前哨一直延伸至露台。尸体曾被拖行至此，随后从边缘抛了下去。”

languages.text: « J'ai découvert un sillage de sang qui s'étend de l'avant-poste au promontoire, preuve qu'on a traîné un corps jusque-là avant de le jeter dans le vide. »
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai découvert un sillage de sang qui s'étend de l'avant-poste au promontoire, preuve qu'on a traîné un corps jusque-là avant de le jeter dans le vide. »

languages.text: "Karakoldan balkona kadar uzanan bir kan izine rast geldim. Bir ceset sürüklenip aşağı atılmış."
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: "Karakoldan balkona kadar uzanan bir kan izine rast geldim. Bir ceset sürüklenip aşağı atılmış."

languages.text: «He encontrado un rastro de sangre que se extiende desde el puesto avanzado hasta el balcón. Alguien arrastró un cuerpo y lo arrojó al vacío».
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado un rastro de sangre que se extiende desde el puesto avanzado hasta el balcón. Alguien arrastró un cuerpo y lo arrojó al vacío».

languages.text: "Ich habe eine Blutspur vom Außenposten zum Balkon gefunden. Eine Leiche wurde dorthin geschleppt und in die Tiefe geworfen."
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe eine Blutspur vom Außenposten zum Balkon gefunden. Eine Leiche wurde dorthin geschleppt und in die Tiefe geworfen."

languages.text: 「砦からバルコニーまで血痕が続いていた。遺体は引きずられて、それから崖から投げ捨てられた」
languages.original_text: "I found a blood trail stretching from the outpost to the balcony. A body was dragged and then dumped over the edge."

traits.locale_text: 「砦からバルコニーまで血痕が続いていた。遺体は引きずられて、それから崖から投げ捨てられた」
